use_cases: Contact page CTA buttons with fluid animated gradient effects
Interactive landing page buttons that respond to hover with color morphing
Marketing sites requiring visually engaging call-to-action buttons
User onboarding flows with animated progress indicators
E-commerce product pages with premium-feeling interactive add-to-cart buttons
ai_summary: A contact button component featuring an animated liquid gradient effect using SVG stops and motion/react animations. The button displays morphing multi-color gradients that shift through color states on hover, creating a premium, fluid visual effect. Includes configurable color palettes and gradient transformation animations for dynamic, engaging CTA elements.
